name: Coherence And Continuity Metrics
description: Propose a curated evaluation_library addition set for coherence and continuity metrics.
related_rules: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
aliases: For each failure mode, note whether solving it likely requires explicit state tracking, runtime enforcement, symbolic constraints, or purely statistical generation changes.
